compressed_context:
CTX: CHUNK=036/039  
RULE: RESPOND-FORMAT = EXPLAIN:… ∧ PLAN:… ∧ CODE: JAVASCRIPT-BLOCK  
DEF: PROMPT-5 = SYSTEM-PROMPT FOR ADDING NEW SKILL→SKILL-LIBRARY-FUNCTION-DESCRIPTIONS  
RULE: DESCRIBE ONLY MAIN-FUNCTION ∧ OMIT(FUNCTION-NAME ∧ BOT.CHAT ∧ HELPER-FUNCTIONS)  
RULE: RESPONSE SINGLE-LINE ∧ ≤6 SENTENCES  
EXAMPLE-CODE: MINECOBBLESTONE(MAIN-FUNCTION)  
EXAMPLE-TE: MINES8-COBBLESTONE USING WOODEN-PICKAXE  
  STEPS: CHECK-INVENTORY→CRAFT? ∧ EQUIP ∧ EXPLORE-UNTIL-STONE ∧ MINE8; SAVE-EVENT  
EXAMPLES:  
  1 CRAFTWOODENPLANKS: ENSURE-LOG-IN-INVENTORY→MINE-LOG?→CRAFT4-PLANKS  
  2 MINETENC0BBLEDEEPSLATEBELOWY0: EQUIP-IRON-PICKAXE→EXPLORE-UNTIL-COBBLED_DEEPSLATE Y<0→MINE10  
  3 SMELTFIVERAWIRON: ENSURE-FURNACE?→PLACE-FURNACE@SUITABLE-POSITION→SMELT5 RAW_IRON W/COAL  
  4 FILLBUCKETWITHWATER: FIND-WATER→PATHFIND→LOOK-AT-BLOCK→EQUIP-BUCKET→ACTIVATE→CHAT-FILLED  
  5 CATCHFIVEFISHSAFELY: ENSURE-FISHING-ROD?→EXPLORE-UNTIL-WATER-BLOCK OR CHAT-NO-PATH→CATCH5-FISH
